title: MGP Lineage Link
description: Machine-readable lineage relationship between memory objects or governance events.

link_id.description: Unique identifier for the lineage link.

source_memory_id.description: Source side of the lineage relation.

target_memory_id.description: Target side of the lineage relation.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the lineage relation was recorded.

metadata.description: Optional implementation-specific metadata for the link.
